Implement the following design in React. Use the following files generated from a Figma design as a specification and guide:


---

```src/styles/HomePage_1920_1280.module.css
@import "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Urbanist:0,400;0,500&display=swap";
.HomePage_1920_1280_160_2 {
  background: linear-gradient(114deg, #505143 0%, #000 60%);
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  padding: 64px 56px 1155px;
  display: flex;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.NavigationBar_160_9 {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  width: 1808px;
  display: flex;
}
.LeftSideNav_159_248 {
  background: #b1d8d429;
  border-radius: 16px;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 20px;
  padding-right: 24px;
  display: flex;
}
.HappeninWordmarkDark_2_159_240 {
  background: #0e2a2c;
  border-radius: 16px;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 2px;
  width: 164.352px;
  height: 61px;
  padding: 16px 24px;
  display: flex;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.HappeninLogo_160_8 {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 116px;
  height: 29px;
}
.Discover_159_245 {
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;

  line-height: normal;
  display: inline-block;
}
```
